//: style is `default` (the Tailwind v3 line), not base-nova: this repo is on Tailwind 3.4 and the employee app is not being migrated to v4 to get a codemod. `rtl: true` is kept so that a future `shadcn add` does the right thing the day we do move — but today the primitives in src/components/ui are hand-vendored, logical-first, and scripts/check-logical-props.mjs is what actually enforces it.
